rationale: UOGTO already models reusable agent and policy structure
Mathematical solver detail is not required for the reusable game graph
Routes are choices and resources remain distinct
UOGTO links game semantics without duplicating transport topology standards
The update rule is needed to retrieve the population transition
Taxonomic semantics are outside the reusable game layer
Rules and enforcement affect admissible play and outcomes
Signal design is needed to represent information assumptions
Domain rights should be supplied by applied packs or alignments
These relations form a reusable learning episode contract
OpenSpiel and MARL implementation details belong in bindings
The score changes strategic choice and is constrained to a unit interval
PROV-O supplies general provenance without duplication
